title: Basis
description: Basis: An ordered set of mutually orthogonal unit vectors defining three-dimensional orientation in space

X.description: Unit vector defining local x coordinate axis Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

Y.description: Unit vector defining local y coordinate axis Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

Z.description: Unit vector defining local z coordinate axis Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
